message:
build(ci): ASUPERSYNC CI lanes + deterministic e2e harness + scenario registry

CI workflow lanes (.github/workflows/ci.yml, +400 lines):
- workflow_dispatch inputs: lane (full/smoke/focused) + focus_crate
- Smoke lane: formatting gate, core/conformance compile gates, tokio
  guardrail report, throughput metrics with step-level timing JSONL
- Focused lane: single-crate validation with targeted test+clippy
- Artifact upload for all lane outputs with 7-day retention
- Conditional job execution based on selected lane
- ASUPERSYNC_CI_LANE environment variable for downstream scripts

E2E matrix runner (run_matrix.sh):
- Deterministic seed propagation: run_id → root_seed → per-scenario seeds
  via SHA-256 hash chain
- --run-id, --seed, --out-root, --only-scenarios, --dry-run CLI options
- Scenario registry integration: validates scenario entries against registry
- Replay artifacts: manifest.json, scenario_plan.json, replay.sh
- Cross-platform hash256() helper (sha256sum/shasum/openssl fallback)
- Artifact index with deterministic checksum hints
- Throughput metrics aggregation across scenarios

Scenario registry (scenario_registry.json):
- Schema-versioned registry (asupersync-e2e-scenario-registry/v1)
- Governance rules: ID patterns, uniqueness constraints, allowed archetypes
- 6 initial scenarios: routing, admission_control, gossip_bounds,
  lease_coordination, policy_enforcement, mesh_integration
- Each scenario: contract_id, archetype, failure_class, user_impact_category

Registry validator (validate_scenario_registry.sh):
- Schema version check, uniqueness enforcement, script existence validation
- Required field presence check per scenario entry
- Archetype allowlist validation

E2E scenario scripts:
- All scripts updated with deterministic seed + run_id propagation
- Structured artifact output paths aligned with matrix runner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # ASUPERSYNC lane: smoke (fast signal for migration churn)
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  migration-smoke:
+    name: ASUPERSYNC Smoke Lane
+    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.lane == 'smoke' }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 20
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          components: rustfmt
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: asupersync-smoke
+
+      - name: Smoke formatting gate
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/smoke
+          start_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          cargo fmt --all -- --check
+          end_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          jq -cn \
+            --arg step "smoke_fmt_check" \
+            --argjson duration_sec "$((end_epoch - start_epoch))" \
+            '{step: $step, duration_sec: $duration_sec}' \
+            >> artifacts/asupersync/smoke/step_durations.jsonl
+
+      - name: Smoke compile gate (core)
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/smoke
+          start_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          cargo check -p fcp-core --all-targets
+          end_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          jq -cn \
+            --arg step "smoke_check_fcp_core" \
+            --argjson duration_sec "$((end_epoch - start_epoch))" \
+            '{step: $step, duration_sec: $duration_sec}' \
+            >> artifacts/asupersync/smoke/step_durations.jsonl
+
+      - name: Smoke compile gate (conformance)
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/smoke
+          start_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          cargo check -p fcp-conformance --all-targets
+          end_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          jq -cn \
+            --arg step "smoke_check_fcp_conformance" \
+            --argjson duration_sec "$((end_epoch - start_epoch))" \
+            '{step: $step, duration_sec: $duration_sec}' \
+            >> artifacts/asupersync/smoke/step_durations.jsonl
+
+      - name: Smoke Tokio guardrail report
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/smoke
+          start_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          bash scripts/ci/asupersync_tokio_guard.sh \
+            --ledger .config/asupersync/tokio_exception_ledger.json \
+            --report artifacts/asupersync/smoke/tokio_guard_report.json
+          end_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          jq -cn \
+            --arg step "smoke_tokio_guardrail" \
+            --argjson duration_sec "$((end_epoch - start_epoch))" \
+            '{step: $step, duration_sec: $duration_sec}' \
+            >> artifacts/asupersync/smoke/step_durations.jsonl
+
+      - name: Smoke throughput metrics
+        if: always()
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/smoke
+          jq -s \
+            --arg generated_at "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" \
+            '{
+              schema_version: 1,
+              generated_at: $generated_at,
+              lane: "smoke",
+              steps: .,
+              total_duration_sec: (map(.duration_sec) | add // 0)
+            }' \
+            artifacts/asupersync/smoke/step_durations.jsonl \
+            > artifacts/asupersync/smoke/throughput_metrics.json
+
+      - name: Upload smoke artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: always()
+        with:
+          name: asupersync-smoke
+          path: artifacts/asupersync/smoke/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # ASUPERSYNC lane: focused crate validation
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  focused-suite:
+    name: Focused Suite (${{ inputs.focus_crate }})
+    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.lane == 'focused' }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 25
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          components: clippy
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: asupersync-focused-${{ inputs.focus_crate }}
+
+      - name: Validate focused crate input
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          if [[ -z "${{ inputs.focus_crate }}" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::focus_crate input is required for focused lane"
+            exit 2
+          fi
+          echo "Focused crate: ${{ inputs.focus_crate }}"
+
+      - name: Focused check
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/focused
+          start_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          cargo check -p ${{ inputs.focus_crate }} --all-targets
+          end_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          jq -cn \
+            --arg step "focused_check" \
+            --argjson duration_sec "$((end_epoch - start_epoch))" \
+            '{step: $step, duration_sec: $duration_sec}' \
+            >> artifacts/asupersync/focused/step_durations.jsonl
+
+      - name: Focused clippy
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/focused
+          start_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          cargo clippy -p ${{ inputs.focus_crate }} --all-targets -- -D warnings
+          end_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          jq -cn \
+            --arg step "focused_clippy" \
+            --argjson duration_sec "$((end_epoch - start_epoch))" \
+            '{step: $step, duration_sec: $duration_sec}' \
+            >> artifacts/asupersync/focused/step_durations.jsonl
+
+      - name: Focused tests
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/focused
+          start_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          cargo test -p ${{ inputs.focus_crate }} --all-targets -- --nocapture
+          end_epoch="$(date +%s)"
+          jq -cn \
+            --arg step "focused_test" \
+            --argjson duration_sec "$((end_epoch - start_epoch))" \
+            '{step: $step, duration_sec: $duration_sec}' \
+            >> artifacts/asupersync/focused/step_durations.jsonl
+
+      - name: Focused throughput metrics
+        if: always()
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/focused
+          jq -s \
+            --arg generated_at "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" \
+            --arg focus_crate "${{ inputs.focus_crate }}" \
+            '{
+              schema_version: 1,
+              generated_at: $generated_at,
+              lane: "focused",
+              focus_crate: $focus_crate,
+              steps: .,
+              total_duration_sec: (map(.duration_sec) | add // 0)
+            }' \
+            artifacts/asupersync/focused/step_durations.jsonl \
+            > artifacts/asupersync/focused/throughput_metrics.json
+
+      - name: Upload focused artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: always()
+        with:
+          name: asupersync-focused
+          path: artifacts/asupersync/focused/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # ASUPERSYNC migration dashboard artifact
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  asupersync-migration-dashboard:
+    name: ASUPERSYNC Migration Dashboard
+    needs: [asupersync-guardrails]
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Build dashboard artifact
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+
+          mkdir -p artifacts/asupersync/dashboard
+
+          bash scripts/ci/asupersync_tokio_guard.sh \
+            --ledger .config/asupersync/tokio_exception_ledger.json \
+            --report artifacts/asupersync/dashboard/tokio_guard_report.json
+
+          METADATA_JSON="$(mktemp)"
+          cargo metadata --format-version 1 --no-deps > "${METADATA_JSON}"
+
+          TOTAL_CRATES="$(jq '[.packages[] | select(.manifest_path | test("/(crates|connectors)/"))] | length' "${METADATA_JSON}")"
+          TOKIO_DEP_CRATES="$(jq '[.packages[] | select(.manifest_path | test("/(crates|connectors)/")) | select(any(.dependencies[]?; .name == "tokio"))] | length' "${METADATA_JSON}")"
+          TOKIO_FREE_CRATES="$((TOTAL_CRATES - TOKIO_DEP_CRATES))"
+
+          TOKIO_TEST_ANNOTATIONS="$( (rg -n --no-heading '#\\[tokio::test\\]' crates connectors || true) | wc -l | tr -d '[:space:]' )"
+          TOKIO_SELECT_USES="$( (rg -n --no-heading 'tokio::select!' crates connectors || true) | wc -l | tr -d '[:space:]' )"
+          TOKIO_SPAWN_USES="$( (rg -n --no-heading 'tokio::spawn' crates connectors || true) | wc -l | tr -d '[:space:]' )"
+
+          GUARD_MISSING="$(jq '.summary.missing_dependency_exceptions' artifacts/asupersync/dashboard/tokio_guard_report.json)"
+          GUARD_EXPIRED="$(jq '.summary.expired_dependency_exceptions' artifacts/asupersync/dashboard/tokio_guard_report.json)"
+          GUARD_FAILED_INVARIANTS="$(jq '.summary.failed_source_invariants' artifacts/asupersync/dashboard/tokio_guard_report.json)"
+          GUARD_PASSED="$(jq '.passed' artifacts/asupersync/dashboard/tokio_guard_report.json)"
+
+          GENERATED_AT="$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
+          LANE="${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.lane || 'full' }}"
+          FOCUS_CRATE="${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.focus_crate || '' }}"
+
+          jq -n \
+            --arg generated_at "${GENERATED_AT}" \
+            --arg lane "${LANE}" \
+            --arg focus_crate "${FOCUS_CRATE}" \
+            --arg workflow "${GITHUB_WORKFLOW}" \
+            --arg run_id "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}" \
+            --arg run_attempt "${GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT}" \
+            --arg sha "${GITHUB_SHA}" \
+            --arg ref_name "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" \
+            --argjson total_crates "${TOTAL_CRATES}" \
+            --argjson tokio_dependency_crates "${TOKIO_DEP_CRATES}" \
+            --argjson tokio_free_crates "${TOKIO_FREE_CRATES}" \
+            --argjson tokio_test_annotations "${TOKIO_TEST_ANNOTATIONS}" \
+            --argjson tokio_select_uses "${TOKIO_SELECT_USES}" \
+            --argjson tokio_spawn_uses "${TOKIO_SPAWN_USES}" \
+            --argjson guard_passed "${GUARD_PASSED}" \
+            --argjson guard_missing_dependency_exceptions "${GUARD_MISSING}" \
+            --argjson guard_expired_dependency_exceptions "${GUARD_EXPIRED}" \
+            --argjson guard_failed_source_invariants "${GUARD_FAILED_INVARIANTS}" \
+            '{
+              schema_version: 1,
+              generated_at: $generated_at,
+              ci: {
+                workflow: $workflow,
+                run_id: $run_id,
+                run_attempt: $run_attempt,
+                sha: $sha,
+                ref_name: $ref_name
+              },
+              lane: {
+                selected: $lane,
+                focus_crate: $focus_crate
+              },
+              migration_progress: {
+                total_workspace_crates: $total_crates,
+                tokio_dependency_crates: $tokio_dependency_crates,
+                tokio_free_crates: $tokio_free_crates,
+                tokio_test_annotations: $tokio_test_annotations,
+                tokio_select_uses: $tokio_select_uses,
+                tokio_spawn_uses: $tokio_spawn_uses
+              },
+              guardrail_status: {
+                passed: $guard_passed,
+                missing_dependency_exceptions: $guard_missing_dependency_exceptions,
+                expired_dependency_exceptions: $guard_expired_dependency_exceptions,
+                failed_source_invariants: $guard_failed_source_invariants
+              }
+            }' > artifacts/asupersync/dashboard/ci_migration_dashboard.json
+
+          {
+            echo "## ASUPERSYNC Migration Dashboard"
+            echo ""
+            echo "- Lane: ${LANE}"
+            echo "- Focus crate: ${FOCUS_CRATE:-n/a}"
+            echo "- Tokio-free crates: ${TOKIO_FREE_CRATES}/${TOTAL_CRATES}"
+            echo "- Tokio test annotations remaining: ${TOKIO_TEST_ANNOTATIONS}"
+            echo "- Tokio guardrails passed: ${GUARD_PASSED}"
+          } >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
+
+      - name: Upload migration dashboard artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: always()
+        with:
+          name: asupersync-migration-dashboard
+          path: artifacts/asupersync/dashboard/
+          retention-days: 7
+

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+REPO_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../.." && pwd)"
+REGISTRY_PATH="${1:-${SCRIPT_DIR}/scenario_registry.json}"
+SCHEMA_VERSION="asupersync-e2e-scenario-registry/v1"
+RUN_MATRIX_PATH="${SCRIPT_DIR}/run_matrix.sh"
+
+require_cmd() {
+  if ! command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    echo "Missing required command: $1" >&2
+    exit 1
+  fi
+}
+
+fail() {
+  echo "Scenario registry validation failed: $*" >&2
+  exit 1
+}
+
+check_unique_field() {
+  local field="$1"
+  local duplicates
+  duplicates="$(jq -r ".scenarios[].${field}" "${REGISTRY_PATH}" | sort | uniq -d || true)"
+  if [[ -n "${duplicates}" ]]; then
+    fail "duplicate ${field} values found: ${duplicates}"
+  fi
+}
+
+require_cmd jq
+require_cmd rg
+
+[[ -f "${REGISTRY_PATH}" ]] || fail "registry file not found: ${REGISTRY_PATH}"
+[[ -f "${RUN_MATRIX_PATH}" ]] || fail "run matrix script not found: ${RUN_MATRIX_PATH}"
+
+jq -e . "${REGISTRY_PATH}" >/dev/null
+
+jq -e \
+  --arg schema "${SCHEMA_VERSION}" \
+  '
+    .schema_version == $schema
+    and (.registry_version | type == "number")
+    and (.governance_rules | type == "object")
+    and (.scenarios | type == "array" and length > 0)
+  ' "${REGISTRY_PATH}" >/dev/null \
+  || fail "registry envelope/schema metadata invalid"
+
+jq -e '
+  .scenarios
+  | all(
+      (.key | type == "string" and test("^[a-z0-9_]+$"))
+      and (.scenario_id | type == "string" and test("^asupersync\\.e2e\\.[a-z0-9_]+$"))
+      and (.script | type == "string" and test("^scripts/e2e/[a-z0-9_]+\\.sh$"))
+      and (.required | type == "boolean")
+      and (.contract_id | type == "string" and test("^contract\\.[a-z0-9_]+$"))
+      and (.archetype | IN("request_response","streaming","bidirectional","queue_pubsub","polling","webhook","database","file_blob","cli_process","browser"))
+      and (.failure_class | type == "string" and length > 0)
+      and (.user_impact_category | IN("security","availability","correctness","performance","cost_control"))
+    )
+' "${REGISTRY_PATH}" >/dev/null \
+  || fail "one or more scenario records fail pattern/type validation"
+
+check_unique_field "key"
+check_unique_field "scenario_id"
+check_unique_field "script"
+check_unique_field "contract_id"
+
+while IFS= read -r script_path; do
+  [[ -f "${REPO_ROOT}/${script_path}" ]] || fail "script missing: ${script_path}"
+done < <(jq -r '.scenarios[].script' "${REGISTRY_PATH}")
+
+mapfile -t registry_keys < <(jq -r '.scenarios[].key' "${REGISTRY_PATH}" | sort -u)
+mapfile -t matrix_keys < <(
+  rg -o --no-filename '"[a-z0-9_]+\|[^"]+\|[^"]+\|(true|false)"' "${RUN_MATRIX_PATH}" \
+    | sed -E 's/^"([a-z0-9_]+)\|.*$/\1/' \
+    | sort -u
+)
+
+missing_in_registry="$(comm -23 <(printf '%s\n' "${matrix_keys[@]}") <(printf '%s\n' "${registry_keys[@]}") || true)"
+extra_in_registry="$(comm -13 <(printf '%s\n' "${matrix_keys[@]}") <(printf '%s\n' "${registry_keys[@]}") || true)"
+
+[[ -z "${missing_in_registry}" ]] || fail "run_matrix scenarios missing from registry: ${missing_in_registry}"
+[[ -z "${extra_in_registry}" ]] || fail "registry scenarios not present in run_matrix: ${extra_in_registry}"
+
+echo "Scenario registry valid: ${REGISTRY_PATH}"
+echo "Scenarios validated: ${#registry_keys[@]}"
